PawsOff, vendored stylesheet notice
===================================

pico.min.css  Pico CSS v2.1.1 (https://picocss.com)
              Copyright 2019-2025 Pico CSS
              Licensed under MIT (https://github.com/picocss/pico/blob/main/LICENSE.md)

Vendored locally on purpose: the extension never loads styles (or anything
else) from a CDN at runtime. PawsOff's own design tokens are bridged onto
Pico's --pico-* variables in src/styles/popup.css.
